title: Carry out pre-repair operations to outdoor power equipment
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out pre-repair operations to outdoor power equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to undertake pre-repair operations

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for pre-repair activity1.3 Select and analyse cleaning options 1.4 Identify and manage risks and hazards associated with the work 1.5 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for pre-repair activity1.3 Select and analyse cleaning options 1.4 Identify and manage risks and hazards associated with the work 1.5 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for pre-repair activity1.3 Select and analyse cleaning options 1.4 Identify and manage risks and hazards associated with the work 1.5 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to undertake pre-repair operations

elements.title: Clean and tag equipment prior to repair or storage

pcs.text: Clean equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to equipment or systems2.2 Tag equipment and prepare for further repair procedures and treat with rust prevention material for storage as required2.3 Dispose of used cleaning materials and waste safely according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to equipment or systems2.2 Tag equipment and prepare for further repair procedures and treat with rust prevention material for storage as required2.3 Dispose of used cleaning materials and waste safely according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements?

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
